---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Use Case

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Scope

What should change?

## Evidence And Output Impact

- Would this change generated `.project-memory/` files?
- Would this change evidence shape, evidence semantics, or analyzer behavior?
- Which docs would need to change?

## Scope Boundary Check

- [ ] This request fits the documented v0.1 scope, or is clearly post-v0.1 future work.
- [ ] This does not casually add connectors, LLM calls, SaaS, web UI, repository chat,
      generic RAG, automatic code modification, or multi-language analysis.
